description_long: This is a modern, open-frame shelving unit constructed primarily from wood, featuring four elongated, rounded rectangular shelves supported by a continuous, tubular wooden frame. The frame curves smoothly at the corners, giving the piece a soft, contemporary aesthetic. The shelves are evenly spaced and appear sturdy, suitable for holding books, decor, or other items. The design is minimalist, with no visible doors, drawers, or handles, emphasizing accessibility and display. The wood grain is visible throughout, adding warmth and texture to the overall appearance. The open sides and back make it ideal for use as a room divider or against a wall in urban environments such as lofts, offices, or cafes.
description: A modern, open-frame wooden shelving unit with four rounded rectangular shelves and a continuous curved frame. Minimalist and accessible, it showcases visible wood grain and a warm finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing all four shelves and the full width of the open frame.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the narrow profile and the curved, tubular frame structure.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, displaying the open back and shelf arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and the continuous frame.
